blended.narrative: Stoneham is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,796 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
